title: A Night of Celebration
description: On pages 1–4, a night of celebration focuses on Nami, Luffy, Zoro, Usopp as the village celebrates after Arlong’s defeat while Nami prepares to leave her home behind.
scene: On pages 1–4, a night of celebration focuses on Nami, Luffy, Zoro, Usopp as the village celebrates after Arlong’s defeat while Nami prepares to leave her home behind.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: night fell upon the island once more,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the waves were as quiet as always.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: However, the thunderous festivities,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: did not subside this night nor the next,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: for the people had all endured for this moment.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: They had endured everything in order to laugh again.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Ahhh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Ahh... I sure ate a lot. Feels nice to stuff yourself every now and then.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hey, Sanji! Was there something on that last Melon you ate just now...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What's with all that meat you're holding onto?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Yeah, it was a melon with raw ham called "Raw Ham Melon."

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Raw Ham Melon!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Where'd you get it!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Not sure since there's food put out everywhere for all the villagers.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Must've picked it up from some- where...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Then I'll go find it!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Now that I've finished eating...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He's been eating non-stop.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's time to flirt with the ladies!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It is I, Captain USOP!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Alright!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: the warrior who defeated one of the fishmen!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Can I get your auto- graph!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Allow me to sing you a song!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Bellie- mere...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Your daughters have grown up to be fine, strong women...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It almost feels like I'm seeing you again,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: When I look at your daughters...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hm...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: from now on,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: All of us will do our best,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: to live life to the fullest.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: because our freedom came at the cost of so many lives,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We have to live our lives to the fullest for their sake.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We have to laugh and smile until our very cheeks hurt...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Raw Ham Melon!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: There's no food here... Darn it.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Oh well, I'll head back.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Just wait right there!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: A grave? Did some- body die?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Yes...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: But it was long ago.

summary: This part releases the tension of Arlong Park through celebration, goodbye, and Nami’s choice to sail with the crew.
